ConnectionStrings._comment: These localhost defaults are for running `dotnet run` directly on your machine. Inside Docker, docker-compose.yml overrides both via ConnectionStrings__Redis and ConnectionStrings__Postgres environment variables (the double-underscore is .NET's convention for nested config keys in env vars) - see docker-compose.yml for the container-network values (host names 'redis' and 'postgres' instead of 'localhost').
